summary: High‑energy 1980 Upstate show with strong performances of Ramble on Rose, Saint of Circumstance, Stella Blue and U.S. Blues, captured in a good‑quality soundboard recording (though the transfer sounds a bit slow).
review: Reviewers rave about this May 1980 SUNY Oneonta concert, calling it a well‑played, high‑energy classic highlighted by standout renditions of Ramble on Rose, Saint of Circumstance, Stella Blue and U.S. Blues. The FLAC source is praised as a great recording, with only one note that the digital transfer feels unusually slow. Overall the performance shines and the tape quality is solid enough for repeated listening.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive comments about the musical performance (70% weight) and a generally good soundboard recording with only minor transfer‑speed concerns (30% weight) lead to an overall rating in the high‑four range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, well‑balanced FLAC capture; one reviewer notes the transfer/playback feels unusually slow (possible digitization speed issue).

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is described as tight from start to finish, with a high‑energy vibe that keeps the momentum flowing throughout both sets.
